name: Thai Style Basil Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Chicken cutlets, skinless, boneless breast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into bite-size chunks.
2. Spray a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray.
3. Brown the chicken in the skillet without adding any fat, turning to brown evenly.
4. Remove the chicken and set aside.
5. Combine onion, celery, and water in the skillet; cook and stir for two minutes.
6. Add tomato juice, red bell pepper, chili pepper, garlic, basil, soy sauce, cumin seeds, cinnamon, and ground ginger.
7. Simmer uncovered for 2 minutes.
8. Uncover and simmer until the sauce is thick, about five minutes.
9. Return the chicken to the skillet; cook and stir until heated through.
